都不变，然后从这个不变中寻找性...","title":"AT_arc110_e","tags":[{"name":"动态规划","slug":"oVREw_RZVM","used":true,"link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/tag/oVREw_RZVM/"}],"feature":"https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/03/gHIyeU1dFnY8tuk.png","link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/post/at_arc110_e/","stats":{"text":"5 22:03:24","dateFormat":"2024-10-01"},{"fileName":"p4036","abstract":"","description":"大家好，我不会平衡树，所以我用线段树过了这一题。 其实就是一个 trick：SGT 不能维护插入操作，于是离线处理：先求出序列最后长度，再倒着做所有插入操作（可以将一开始的序列也视作若干次插入）。 先将序列上每个位置标为 111，于是插入到...","title":"P4036","tags":[{"name":"数据结构","slug":"62NLXw5-u0","used":true,"link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/tag/62NLXw5-u0/"}],"feature":"https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/02/LNjXBPnuaShTMKJ.png","link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/post/p4036/","stats":{"text":"6 首先考虑暴力地做：发现 LLL 非常大，于是大概率是要矩阵快速幂，求出最后的邻接矩阵的。如果对暴力处理出所有 TTT 次操作后的最终矩阵，复杂度为 O(Tn2log⁡L)=O(n4log⁡L)O(Tn^2\\log L)=O(...","title":"AT_abc236_g","tags":[{"name":"矩阵","slug":"4YQrnlKOs","used":true,"link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/tag/4YQrnlKOs/"}],"feature":"https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/02/NPs63fYtxVB51DL.png","link":"https://littleyinhee.github.io/post/at_abc236_g/","stats":{"text":"14 次能跳到哪里。
